head.hi: Memorandum handed to Acting Secretary Hill by the Chinese Minister.

p.hi: Cablegram from Earl Li Hung Chang, dated Shanghai, September 12, 1900, to Minister Wu, who received it on the evening of the same day.

div.p: Your telegram of September 11 received. I have proper credentials, with full and authoritative powers for opening and conducting negotiations with the several powers. The life and property of Americans in China will be respected.
